user.title: EV Auto Smart Charge
user.description: Select your Energi Data Service device (hourly spot prices), then the Tesla vehicle device and the Volkswagen-group vehicle device (VW / Škoda / SEAT). The integration picks the price sensor from the EDS device (raw_today / raw_tomorrow). Battery %, charge limit, cable/connector, and location are read from the EV devices. Default capacities: EV1 73 kWh, EV2 58 kWh.

data.charger_power_kw: Wallbox power (kW), combined if one charger
data.target_soc_percent: Fallback charge target (%) if the car has no charge-limit entity

data.charge_priority: Which EV gets the wallbox first when both need charging
data.target_soc_percent: Fallback charge target (%) if charge limit is missing on the device
